birds.title: My Birds

birds.species_help_canary: Species-based records and incubation support are enabled for canaries. Genetics is limited for now.
birds.species_help_cockatiel: Records, pairing, and incubation are enabled for cockatiels. Genetics tools currently run in limited mode.
birds.species_help_finch: Basic records and breeding tracking are available for finches. Advanced genetics is not supported yet.

backup.export_excel_desc: Download all your data as an Excel spreadsheet

notifications.egg_turning_desc: Reminds you of daily egg turning times
notifications.incubation_desc: Notifies you about incubation stages and expected hatch dates
notifications.chick_care_desc: Reminds you of chick care tasks
notifications.health_check_desc: Reminds you of periodic health checks
notifications.channel_egg_turning_desc: Egg turning time reminders (3 times daily)

notifications.master_toggle_desc: Toggle all notification categories at once

notifications.battery_steps_samsung: Samsung: Settings > Battery > Background usage limits > Remove BudgieTrack from the list
notifications.battery_steps_xiaomi: Xiaomi/Redmi: Settings > Apps > Manage apps > BudgieTrack > Enable Autostart and set Battery saver to 'No restrictions'

Subscription automatically renews unless it is canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period. You can manage and cancel your subscriptions by going to Settings > Subscriptions after purchase. Any unused portion of a free trial period will be forfeited when you purchase a subscription.

genetics.local_ai_desc: Run a local model through Ollama to generate genetics commentary for the selected pair and observation-based sex estimation.
genetics.local_ai_hint: Use 127.0.0.1 when Ollama runs on the same device. On Android emulator you usually need 10.0.2.2.
genetics.local_ai_hint_openrouter: OpenRouter offers free models (200 requests/day). Get your API key from openrouter.ai.
genetics.local_ai_models_empty: No models were listed. Test the connection or refresh the model list.
genetics.local_ai_pair_required: Select at least one parent before running genetics insight.
genetics.complete_pair_required: Select both mother and father to continue to the next step and calculate offspring results.
genetics.image_ai_desc: Send a single bird photo to the model and force selection from a fixed mutation label list.
genetics.sex_photo_hint: A close-up cere photo significantly improves estimation accuracy.
genetics.sex_observations_hint: Example: 5 months old, cere is pale blue-white, forehead bars just clearing, calm behavior, possibly opaline.
genetics.sex_observations_required: Enter observation notes to estimate sex.
genetics.local_ai_error_image_not_found: Selected image was not found. Please select the image again.
genetics.local_ai_error_image_too_large: Image size exceeds the 10 MB limit. Please select a smaller image.
genetics.local_ai_error_unexpected_response: Local model service returned an unexpected response format.
genetics.local_ai_error_ollama_timeout: Local model timed out. Check the Ollama service and model status.
genetics.local_ai_error_ollama_unreachable: Cannot connect to local model. Check that the Ollama service is running and the URL is correct.
genetics.local_ai_error_unparseable: Local model service returned an unrecognizable response.
genetics.local_ai_error_api_key_required: OpenRouter API key is required. Please enter your key.
genetics.local_ai_error_api_key_invalid: OpenRouter API key is invalid. Please check your key.
genetics.local_ai_error_openrouter_timeout: OpenRouter timed out. Check your internet connection.
genetics.local_ai_error_openrouter_unreachable: Cannot connect to OpenRouter. Check your internet connection.
genetics.local_ai_error_model_list_format: Model list is not in the expected format.
genetics.local_ai_error_model_list_timeout: Timed out while retrieving model list.
genetics.local_ai_error_model_list_unparseable: Model list could not be parsed.
genetics.local_ai_error_invalid_url: Local model URL is invalid. Example: http://127.0.0.1:11434
genetics.local_ai_error_generate_ollama_timeout: Local model timed out. Try with shorter input or a lighter model.
genetics.local_ai_error_generate_parse: Model response could not be parsed. Try with shorter input.
genetics.local_ai_error_generate_openrouter_timeo: OpenRouter timed out. Please try again.
genetics.local_ai_error_generate_openrouter_unrea: Cannot connect to OpenRouter API. Check your internet connection.
genetics.local_ai_error_rate_limit: OpenRouter request limit exceeded. Please wait a moment and try again.
genetics.title: Genetics Calculator
genetics.inbreeding_desc_minimal: Very distant relation. No significant health impact expected.
genetics.inbreeding_desc_low: Low inbreeding level. Careful monitoring recommended.
genetics.inbreeding_desc_moderate: Moderate inbreeding. Genetic diversity may be reduced.
genetics.inbreeding_desc_high: High inbreeding! Risk of health issues and reduced vitality.
genetics.inbreeding_desc_critical: Critical inbreeding level! This pairing is strongly discouraged.
genetics.inbreeding_depth_limited: Pedigree depth limit reached — actual coefficient may be higher.
genetics.no_results_hint: Select parent mutations to calculate offspring predictions
genetics.no_results_hint_filtered: No valid offspring combination could be produced for the selected mutations. Check your parent selections
genetics.probability_chart_a11y: Chart showing {} different offspring color probabilities
genetics.z_gene_order: Gene order: Opaline — Cinnamon — Ino — Slate
genetics.show_genotype_hint: Show genotype code for each offspring
genetics.carrier_info_tip: Tap the V/C badge on a mutation chip to toggle carrier status.
genetics.allele_dosage_tooltip:
DF = Homozygous (double factor)
SF = Heterozygous (single factor)
genetics.allele_state_tooltip:
V = Visual (homozygous)
C = Carrier (heterozygous)
S = Split (two different Z alleles)
genetics.epistasis_note: Epistasis: Phenotype changed due to gene interaction
genetics.no_mutations_hint: This bird has no mutation data
genetics.save_note_hint: Add a note for this calculation (optional)
genetics.no_history_hint: Make a calculation and save it to view here
genetics.color_audit_primary_subtitle: WBO base tones + high-risk mutation visuals
genetics.color_audit_compound_subtitle: Complex combinations, pied, yellowface, and rare variants
genetics.delete_history_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this calculation record?
genetics.stale_calculation: This calculation is based on outdated constants — results may not be accurate
genetics.confirm_reset_desc: Are you sure you want to reset all parent selections?
genetics.max_alleles_at_locus: Maximum 2 alleles can be selected at this locus
genetics.female_one_z_allele: Females are hemizygous (ZW): only 1 allele can be selected at this locus
genetics.lethal_df_crested_desc: Crested pairings are associated with sub-vital outcomes, including elevated mortality (~48%) and possible neurological/developmental issues.
genetics.lethal_df_spangle_desc: DF Spangle birds survive but are often weaker with reduced feather quality.
genetics.lethal_df_dominant_pied_desc: DF Dominant (Australian) Pied has significantly reduced viability. Dominant Pied × Dominant Pied produces 25% DF offspring with elevated mortality.
genetics.lethal_ino_x_ino_desc: When both parents are visual Ino, offspring may develop feather cysts, weakened immunity, eye problems, and higher chick mortality.
genetics.lethal_feather_duster_desc: Homozygous feather duster (fdu/fdu) is invariably lethal. Affected chicks develop continuously growing, curly feathers and rarely survive beyond a few months.
genetics.reverse_select_mutations: Select mutations above to see parent combinations
genetics.reverse_no_combinations_desc: These specific mutations cannot be combined.
genetics.local_ai_genetics_info: This feature analyzes parent genotypes to predict possible offspring outcomes. It uses genetics calculator results as reference. Results are estimates and do not guarantee genetic accuracy.
genetics.sex_ai_info: Enter observations about cere color, age, behavior to get a sex estimate. You can optionally add a cere photo. Results are not definitive and should be confirmed with DNA testing.

registration.title: Registration & Login
registration.subtitle: Sign up to start using the app
registration.intro: You need to create an account to start using the app. You can quickly register with your email address and a password.
registration.step1: Tap the 'Register' button on the login screen.
registration.step2: Enter your email address and a secure password.
registration.step3: Tap the verification link sent to your email.
registration.step4: Log in after your account is verified.
registration.tip_password: Use at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase letters, and numbers for a strong password.
registration.tip_2fa: You can enable Two-Factor Authentication in Settings for extra security.

dashboard.title: Dashboard Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Statistics and quick access on the home screen
dashboard.intro: The home screen provides a summary of all your data. You can see total bird count, active breeding pairs, recently added chicks, and pending notifications at a glance.
dashboard.stats_info: Stat cards show your total birds, active pairs, eggs, and chick counts. Tap on cards for details.
dashboard.quick_actions: Use quick action buttons to add new birds, breeding pairs, or eggs.
dashboard.tip_refresh: Pull down on the screen to refresh the data.

navigation.title: App Navigation
navigation.subtitle: Navigate between tabs and menus
navigation.intro: The app consists of five main sections. You can quickly switch between them using the bottom navigation bar.
navigation.bottom_nav: The bottom bar includes Home, Birds, Breeding, Calendar, and More tabs.
navigation.more_menu: From the More menu, you can access Statistics, Genealogy, Genetics, Settings, Profile, Notifications, Backup, and this guide.
navigation.tip_back: Use the back arrow in the top-left corner to return from detail pages.

bird_management.title: Adding & Editing Birds
bird_management.subtitle: Register and edit your birds
bird_management.intro: In the Birds section, you can view all your birds, add new ones, and edit existing records.
bird_management.add_step1: Tap the '+' button at the bottom-right of the Birds screen.
bird_management.add_step2: Enter the bird's name, gender, species, and ring number.
bird_management.add_step3: Optionally add birth date and color mutation.
bird_management.tip_ring: Ring number should be unique for each bird. This number is used in the genealogy tree and genetic calculations.
bird_management.warning_delete: Deleting a bird may affect all related breeding records and chick information.

filtering.title: Filtering & Search
filtering.subtitle: Quickly find your birds with filters and search
filtering.intro: You can quickly search your bird list and use various filtering options.
filtering.filter_types: Filter options: All, Male, Female, Alive, Dead, Sold. Tap the options in the filter bar to narrow your list.
filtering.search_info: Type a bird name or ring number in the search bar to see instant results.
filtering.tip_combine: You can combine filters and search. For example, select 'Male' filter then search by name.

health_records.title: Health Records
health_records.subtitle: Track your birds' health history
health_records.intro: Track the health status of your birds. You can record vet visits, vaccination records, and treatment information.
health_records.add_step1: Go to the 'Health Records' section from the bird detail page.
health_records.add_step2: Select the record type (examination, vaccination, treatment, etc.).
health_records.warning_vet: This app does not replace veterinary advice. Always consult an avian veterinarian for serious health issues.

breeding_pair.title: Creating Breeding Pairs
breeding_pair.subtitle: Create and manage breeding pairs
breeding_pair.intro: In the Breeding section, you can create breeding pairs from your birds and track the breeding process from start to finish.
breeding_pair.step1: Tap the '+' button on the Breeding screen.
breeding_pair.step2: Select the male bird from the list.
breeding_pair.step3: Select the female bird from the list.
breeding_pair.step4: Enter the pairing date and save.
breeding_pair.warning_inbreeding: Avoid pairing closely related birds. The app will warn about inbreeding based on genealogy data.
breeding_pair.tip_nest: You can assign a nest when creating a pair. This is helpful when tracking multiple pairs.

eggs_incubation.title: Egg & Incubation Tracking
eggs_incubation.subtitle: Egg registration and incubation tracking
eggs_incubation.intro: From the breeding pair detail page, you can add eggs and track the incubation process day by day.
eggs_incubation.step1: Tap 'Add Egg' on the breeding pair detail page.
eggs_incubation.step2: Enter the date the egg was laid.
eggs_incubation.step3: The incubation period is automatically calculated (18 days).
eggs_incubation.step4: Update the egg status (fertile, infertile, damaged, hatched).
eggs_incubation.tip_candling: You can check if the egg is fertile by candling (light checking) after 7-10 days.
eggs_incubation.tip_period: Budgie eggs typically hatch in 18 days. Wait up to 21 days for late ones.

chick_tracking.title: Chick Tracking & Growth
chick_tracking.subtitle: Monitor chick development and growth
chick_tracking.intro: Track the growth process of hatched chicks in detail. You can record weight measurements, development stages, and health status.
chick_tracking.step1: Select a chick from the Chicks screen or add a new one.
chick_tracking.step2: Add regular weight measurements (Detail > Add Measurement).
chick_tracking.step3: When the chick is mature, use 'Convert to Bird' to transfer it to the birds list.
chick_tracking.promote_info: When you convert a chick to a bird, a new bird record is automatically created and all the chick's information is transferred.
chick_tracking.tip_weight: Daily weight measurements during the first 2 weeks help you understand if the chick is developing healthily.

calendar_notifications.title: Calendar & Notifications
calendar_notifications.subtitle: Calendar events and reminders
calendar_notifications.intro: In the Calendar section, you can view all important events, add new events, and set up reminders.
calendar_notifications.calendar_info: The calendar displays breeding dates, incubation end dates, vet appointments, and custom events. Tap a day to see its details.
calendar_notifications.notification_info: From the Notifications section, you can manage your reminder preferences. Incubation end, vaccination reminders, and custom notifications can be configured.
calendar_notifications.tip_reminder: Set up automatic notifications for important incubation days so you never miss an important date.

genealogy_genetics.title: Genealogy & Genetic Calculation
genealogy_genetics.subtitle: Family tree and genetic calculations
genealogy_genetics.intro: Visually explore your birds' family tree and predict possible offspring colors with genetic calculations.
genealogy_genetics.family_tree: The genealogy view shows a bird's lineage going back to mother, father, and earlier generations. Accessible from each bird's detail page.
genealogy_genetics.punnett_info: With the Punnett square, you can calculate possible offspring colors and mutations from two birds. Select the parents' mutations and view the results.
genealogy_genetics.premium_note: Genealogy and genetic calculation features require a Premium membership.
genealogy_genetics.warning_inbreeding: Genetic calculation results may differ for inbred pairings. Check the inbreeding coefficient.

backup_export.title: Backup & Export
backup_export.subtitle: Back up and export your data
backup_export.intro: Safely back up your data and export it in PDF or Excel format.
backup_export.backup_step3: The backup file is created and can be shared.
backup_export.export_info: You can create reports in PDF and Excel formats. PDF reports include bird cards, breeding records, and statistics. Excel files present all data in table format.
backup_export.warning_restore: Restoring a backup will overwrite your current data. Remember to backup your current data before restoring.

sync.title: Data Synchronization
sync.subtitle: Cross-device data synchronization
sync.intro: Your data is automatically synchronized with the cloud. You can work offline, and changes are automatically updated when the internet connection returns.
sync.offline_info: You can add and edit data without an internet connection. All changes are stored in the local database.
sync.conflict_info: If you edit the same record on multiple devices, the latest server version takes priority (server-wins).
sync.tip_connection: After making important changes, check your internet connection and wait for synchronization to complete.
sync.warning_data_loss: Do not uninstall the app or close your account before synchronization is complete. Otherwise, pending changes may be lost.

profile_settings.title: Profile & Settings
profile_settings.subtitle: Profile information and app settings
profile_settings.intro: You can update your profile information and customize app settings.
profile_settings.profile_info: From the Profile page, you can edit your name, avatar photo, and contact information.
profile_settings.settings_info: From the Settings section, you can manage theme (light/dark), language (Turkish, English, German), notification preferences, and security settings.
profile_settings.tip_language: To change the app language, go to Settings > Language. The change is applied immediately.

premium.title: Premium Membership
premium.subtitle: Access premium features and subscription
premium.intro: Get unlimited access to all features with Premium membership and take your breeding experience to the next level.
premium.features_list: Premium features: Unlimited bird records, detailed statistics and charts, genealogy tree view, genetic calculation (Punnett square), priority support.
premium.subscribe_step1: Go to More > Premium Membership section.
premium.subscribe_step3: Complete the payment, features are activated instantly.
premium.premium_note: Premium membership can be cancelled at any time. After cancellation, features remain active until the end of the period.

legal.privacy_collected_body: The app processes breeding records, birds, chicks, health data, reminders, and preference settings required to deliver core functionality.
legal.privacy_usage_body: Your data is used to provide app features, backup/sync operations, and product quality improvements.
legal.privacy_security_body: Reasonable technical and organizational safeguards are applied, but no system can be guaranteed as completely risk-free.
legal.privacy_ads_body: Free-tier users may see ads served by Google AdMob. AdMob may collect anonymous device identifiers, ad interaction data, and general usage patterns to serve relevant ads. You can opt out of personalized ads in your device settings. Premium subscribers do not see ads. We also use Sentry for crash reporting (anonymous technical data only) and RevenueCat for subscription management.
legal.terms_acceptance_body: By using the app, you agree to these terms. Terms may be updated from time to time.
legal.terms_account_body: You are responsible for keeping your account credentials secure and up to date.
legal.terms_subscription_body: Premium purchases are governed by the relevant app store terms. Refund and cancellation are subject to store policy.
legal.cg_conduct_body: Be respectful and kind to fellow breeders. Personal attacks, harassment, hate speech, and bullying are strictly prohibited. Keep discussions relevant to budgerigar breeding, care, and genetics.
legal.cg_content_body: The following content is not allowed: spam or self-promotion, misleading or false information about bird care, explicit or violent imagery, sale of live animals or illegal products, content that violates any applicable law, and personal information of others without consent.
legal.cg_enforcement_body: Violations may result in: content removal without notice, temporary or permanent account suspension, loss of community access. Severity and frequency of violations determine the consequence. Decisions are final but may be appealed via support@budgiebreedingtracker.online.
legal.cg_reporting_body: Use the report button on any post or comment to flag content that violates these guidelines. Select the appropriate reason (spam, harassment, inappropriate content, misinformation, or other). Reports are reviewed and actioned promptly. False reports may themselves result in enforcement action.
